rubric: Grade the response on three axes: accuracy of the legal citation (CO, LTVA, LAVS, BVG), correctness of the rate or threshold quoted, and avoidance of any French (CGI, DGFIP, BOFiP, URSSAF, CSG) or German (UStG, AO) references that do not apply in Switzerland.

criteria.name: legal_basis
criteria.description: Cites the correct Swiss federal law (CO, LTVA, LAVS, BVG, UVG)

criteria.name: numeric_accuracy
criteria.description: Rate, threshold, or formula quoted matches the in-force value for 2026
